sales.title:
NumisCorner - Auction 6, Lot 135 — Elagabalus, Aureus, 218-222, Antioch, Very rare, Gold, NGC, Ch VF 5/5-2/5
Bust of Elagabalus, laureate, draped, cuirassed, right., Slow quadriga moving right, on which is set the conical stone of Emes
sales.description:
Elagabalus, Aureus, 218-222, Antioch, Very rare, Gold, NGC, Ch VF 5/5-2/5
Bust of Elagabalus, laureate, draped, cuirassed, right., Slow quadriga moving right, on which is set the conical stone of Emesa surmounted by eagle; in carriage, the stone is surrounded by four parasols, Graded NGC Ch VF Strike: 5/5 Surface: 2/5. Graffito. Marks. Bent. RIC IV Elagabalus 196A, bust variety (to right, not to left). Aureus in an overall bad state of preservation, showing numerous signs of circulation wear ...
